title: CrossMatrixDimensions
description: ADR-0004 DIMENSIONS layer: the axes + their members (rosters) — the ENTITIES being cross-referenced. FEDERATED: each domain system (e.g. a UX tool, a JTBD tool, an FMECA tool) owns its dimension's members; crossmatrix is never the source of truth for entities. A member's numeric `weight` is permitted ONLY with a `sourceRef.system` (a deterministic import, e.g. fmeca criticality); otherwise the LLM supplies a categorical `weightObservation`. Identified by stable id+version (`dimensionSetId`); a Configuration references it by `dimensionSetRef` (NOT a $ref). One Dimensions doc can be shared across many Configurations/aspects.

dimensionSetId.description: Stable logical identifier for this entity set (with `version`). NOT a file path.

DimensionKind.description: A TYPED DISPATCH discriminator (engine binds kind-capabilities: weight-source policy, valid relations/scales, routing). Affords/validates/routes; never imports domain ALGORITHMS.

SourceRef.description: A VERIFIABLE pointer to the authoritative artifact (federation). `system` present => a deterministic import (a numeric weight is permitted). `contentHash` lets the engine re-hash and detect staleness.

weightObservation.description: LLM PATH: categorical importance/criticality token, resolved by the dimension's weightScale (declared in the Configuration's scales).

weight.description: DETERMINISTIC-IMPORT PATH ONLY: permitted iff sourceRef.system is set. LLM may not set this.

system.description: The federated owner system (e.g. fmeca | telemetry | research).

weightScale.description: Scale id (declared in the Configuration) the member weightObservations resolve against.
